segments.text: Does not wisdom call out? Does not understanding raise her voice?
At the highest point along the way, where the paths meet, she takes her stand;
beside the gate leading into the city, at the entrance, she cries aloud:
To you, O people, I call out; I raise my voice to all mankind.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: You who are simple, gain prudence; you who are foolish, set your hearts on it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen, for I have trustworthy things to say; I open my lips to speak what is right.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My mouth speaks what is true, for my lips detest wickedness.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words of my mouth are just; none of them is crooked or perverse.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: To the discerning all of them are right; they are upright to those who have found knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Choose my instruction instead of silver, knowledge rather than choice gold,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: for wisdom is more precious than rubies, and nothing you desire can compare with her.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I, wisdom, dwell together with prudence; I possess knowledge and discretion.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: To fear the Lord is to hate evil; I hate pride and arrogance, evil behavior and perverse speech.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Counsel and sound judgment are mine; I have insight, I have power.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me kings reign and rulers issue decrees that are just;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: by me princes govern, and nobles—all who rule on earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love those who love me, and those who seek me find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: With me are riches and honor, enduring wealth and prosperity.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My fruit is better than fine gold; what I yield surpasses choice silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I walk in the way of righteousness, along the paths of justice,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: bestowing a rich inheritance on those who love me and making their treasuries full.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The Lord brought me forth as the first of his works, before his deeds of old;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was formed long ages ago, at the very beginning, when the world came to be.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When there were no watery depths, I was given birth, when there were no springs overflowing with water;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: before the mountains were settled in place, before the hills, I was given birth,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: before he made the world or its fields or any of the dust of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was there when he set the heavens in place, when he marked out the horizon on the face of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he established the clouds above and fixed securely the fountains of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he gave the sea its boundary so the waters would not overstep his command, and when he marked out the foundations of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Then I was constantly at his side. I was filled with delight day after day, rejoicing always in his presence,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: rejoicing in his whole world and delighting in mankind.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Now then, my children, listen to me; blessed are those who keep my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen to my instruction and be wise; do not disregard it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Blessed are those who listen to me, watching daily at my doors, waiting at my doorway.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For those who find me find life and receive favor from the Lord.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But those who fail to find me harm themselves; all who hate me love death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
